title: schismatoclada aurantiaca
intro: Schismatoclada aurantiaca, also known as the orange-flowered schismatoclada, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to Madagascar. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits associated with Schismatoclada aurantiaca include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce the risk of infection. Schismatoclada aurantiaca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
